title: dianthus guttatus subsp. guttatus
intro: Dianthus guttatus subsp. guttatus, also known as the fragrant pink or pink pink clover, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, skin issues, and infections. The health benefits of Dianthus guttatus subsp. guttatus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever.
